allow: Bash(sed -i '' 's/bg={bg} overlays={assets?.overlays} text={config.text}/bg={bg} overlays={assets?.overlays} texts={assets?.texts} text={config.text}/' components/admin/brand/steps/BackgroundsStepAll.tsx)

Bash(sed -i '' 's/texts={texts} onTextChange={\(id, patch\) => updateText\(gt, id, patch\)} text={text} \\/>/texts={texts} padTop={assets?.padTop ?? 0} onTextChange={\(id, patch\) => updateText\(gt, id, patch\)} text={text} \\/>/' components/admin/brand/steps/TextStepAll.tsx)

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 30;$i++\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 3; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break }catch{ Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1500 } }; if\(-not $ok\){ "not ready yet" })

PowerShell(foreach\($p in @\("/brands","/brand"\)\){ try{ $r=Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000$p" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20 -MaximumRedirection 0 -ErrorAction Stop; "$p -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" }catch{ $s=$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode.value__; if\($s\){ "$p -> $s \(redirect/err\)" } else { "$p -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } } })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; "home: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "GAMEFIY STUDIOS"\) { "wordmark: found" } else { "wordmark: MISSING" }; if \($r.Content -match "Selected work"\) { "work section: found" } } catch { "home error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

Every kind of game"\) { "intro slide: found" } else { "intro slide: not in SSR \(client-rendered carousel - ok\)" }; if \($r.Content -match "Selected work"\) { "work section: found" } } catch { "home error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 120; "home: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match "Every kind of game"\) { "grid heading: found" }; if \($r.Content -match "Selected work|Branded games we"\) { "OLD sections still present!" } else { "old sections removed: ok" } } catch { "home error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
